description: Pre-compiled regex constant removed; `re.compile()` now called on every iteration.
diff:
diff --git a/parser.py b/parser.py
--- a/parser.py
+++ b/parser.py
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
-DATE_RE = re.compile(r"\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}")
-
 def find_dates(texts):
-    return [DATE_RE.findall(t) for t in texts]
+    return [re.compile(r"\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}").findall(t) for t in texts]
